description: The Auras of injured Survivors being healed or healing themselves are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: A Nurse's Calling

description: While carrying a Survivor, your Carrying speed is increased by {percentage}% and your Terror Radius is increased by +12 metres.
name: Agitation

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor, the Aura of the farthest injured Survivor is revealed to you for 8 seconds, and that Survivor suffers from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Alien Instinct

description: After falling from a height, the range of your Lunge Attack is increased by +75 % for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 5 seconds.
name: All-Shaking Thunder

description: While carrying a Survivor, the Auras of other Survivors within {range} metres of your location are revealed to you.
name: Awakened Awareness

description: Your Vaulting speed is increased by {percentage}%. Whenever you vault a Window, that Window is blocked for all Survivors for {duration} seconds. Vaulting it again within that time resets the timer. Vaulting a different one transfers the effect to it instead. Does not apply to dropped Pallets.
name: Bamboozle

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: After hooking a Survivor, the Auras of all Survivors at least {range} metres away from that Hook are revealed to you for 5 seconds.
name: Barbecue & Chilli

description: While within 16 metres of a completed Generator, you gain a +5 % Haste Status Effect. The effect lingers for {duration} second(s).
name: Batteries Included

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Whenever you trigger the Bloodlust Status Effect, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Beast of Prey

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, the Auras of Survivors within 16 metres of that Generator are revealed to you for 5 seconds. Once the last Generator is completed, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Bitter Murmur

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor, all injured Survivors suffer from the Exhausted and Haemorrhage Status Effects for {duration} seconds.
name: Blood Echo

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: As soon as at least one Exit Gate is opened, the Auras of Survivors inside an Exit Gate are revealed to you. Once per Trial, hooking a Survivor while active blocks all opened Exit Gates for {duration} seconds, preventing any remaining Survivor from leaving through them.
name: Blood Warden

description: Pools of Blood left by injured Survivors appear in bright red. Their lifetime is extended by {duration} seconds.
name: Bloodhound

description: While performing the Break or Damage action on Breakable Walls, Pallets, or Generators, the Action speed is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Brutal Strength

description: After damaging a Generator, for 70 seconds its Regression speed is increased to {percentage}% of the default value, its Aura is highlighted to you in yellow, and it triggers a Loud Noise Notification whenever a Survivor succeeds a Good Skill Check while repairing it.
name: Call of Brine

description: At the start of the Trial, the 3 Generators farthest from you are blocked for {duration} seconds. Deactivates prematurely once the first Survivor is put into the Dying State.
name: Corrupt Intervention

description: Survivors inside your Terror Radius have their Healing speeds reduced by {percentage}% and the Pointer-Rotation speed of their Healing Skill Checks increased by +50 %.
name: Coulrophobia

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, Coup de Grâce gains +2 Tokens, up to a maximum of 10 Tokens per Trial. Your next Lunge Attack range is increased by {percentage}% while consuming -1 Token. Can only hold a maximum of 5 Tokens at a time.
name: Coup de Grace

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, all Windows are blocked for all Survivors for {duration} seconds. The Auras of the blocked Windows are highlighted to you in yellow.
name: Cruel Limits

description: Each time you hook a Survivor other than the Obsession, you gain +1 Token. While the Obsession is alive, all other Survivors suffer a stack-able {percentage}% per Token Action Speed penalty to Repairing, Healing, and Sabotaging, up to a maximum of {percentage2}% or 11 Tokens. The Obsession is unaffected by this penalty and instead gains a permanent +33 % Action Speed bonus to Unhooking and Healing other Survivors. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Cull the Weak

description: Your Vaulting speed is increased by {percentage}%. Whenever you are stunned with a Pallet or blinded by any means, your Recovery speed from Pallet Stuns is reduced by -15 % and the duration of Killer Blinds is increased by +15 %.
name: Dark Arrogance

description: Whenever the Obsession becomes injured, for {duration} seconds your Terror Radius transfers to the Obsession and is set to 40 metres, and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Dark Devotion

description: Searching a Locker reveals the Auras of Survivors within 8 metres of any Locker to you for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 30 seconds.
name: Darkness Revealed

description: After hooking a Survivor, the first Generator any Survivor stops repairing is blocked for {duration} seconds. The blocked Generator is highlighted to you in white. Cannot activate while its effect is still active from a previous activation.
name: Dead Man's Switch

description: Whenever a Survivor finishes healing another Survivor for 1 Health State, the Healer screams and reveals their location. The Healer suffers from the Oblivious Status Effect whenever they are farther than {range} metres from the other Survivor, and sees the Aura of the Healed Survivor while active. Deactivates after the Healer loses a Health State.
name: Deathbound

description: Whenever a Survivor reads your Aura, their Aura is revealed to you for the same duration as their Aura-reading action. Every {duration} seconds, your Aura is revealed for 3 seconds to the Survivor with the lowest cumulative Chase time.
name: Deerstalker

description: Any Generator within {range} metres being repaired by 2 or more Survivors is marked by a yellow Aura and triggers a Loud Noise Notification when first highlighted. The Aura lingers for another 4 seconds after the Generator leaves range or is being repaired by only 1 Survivor.
name: Discordance

description: 3 seconds after injuring a Survivor, for {duration} seconds the next Pallet that Survivor performs a Fast Vault across while inside your Terror Radius is instantly broken.
name: Dissolution

description: Your Terror Radius is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Distressing

description: The first time each Chest and each Totem is interacted with by a Survivor, it is blocked for {duration} seconds. The Aura of the blocked Prop is revealed to you in white.
name: Dominance

description: After damaging a Generator, for 30 seconds the first Survivor to interact with it screams and reveals their location for 4 seconds, and suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for 60 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Dragon's Grip

description: The duration of Pallet Stuns is reduced by {percentage}%. Does not apply while carrying a Survivor.
name: Enduring

description: Damaging a Generator highlights its Aura in yellow. Whenever a Survivor enters the Dying State, all highlighted Generators explode, instantly regress by -10 % of their total Progression, and start regressing. Survivors currently repairing them scream and their Auras are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 30 seconds, which also resets the highlighted Auras.
name: Eruption

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: For each completed Generator, Fire Up gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. The Action speeds for Picking up and dropping Survivors, Breaking Breakable Walls and dropped Pallets, Damaging Generators, and Vaulting Windows are increased by a stack-able {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%.
name: Fire Up

description: Whenever a Survivor is put into the Dying State, all other Survivors within 16 metres of them suffer from a -20 % Hindered Status Effect for 10 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Forced Hesitation

description: Whenever a Survivor triggers a Protection Hit, they suffer from the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Forced Penance

description: Whenever a Survivor takes damage, Forever Entwined gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. The Action speeds for Dropping, Hooking, and Picking up a Survivor are increased by a stack-able +4 % per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage}%.
name: Forever Entwined

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Survivors hit with your Basic Attack drop any equipped Item on impact. The Auras of lost Items are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Franklin's Demise

description: When you hook a Survivor other than the Obsession, the Obsession's Aura is revealed for {duration} seconds and they suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 20 seconds. When you hook the Obsession, a random Survivor screams and reveals their location to you, and becomes the new Obsession. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Friends 'til the End

description: After hooking the Obsession, for {duration} seconds you gain the Undetectable Status Effect and a +10 % Haste Status Effect. Whenever the Obsession is unhooked by another Survivor, the Obsession Status transfers to their Rescuer. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Furtive Chase

description: Whenever you hit the Survivor with the highest cumulative Chase time with a Basic Attack, the Obsession Status transfers to that Survivor. While chasing the Obsession, performing the Break or Damage action grants a +7 % Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Game Afoot

description: After a Survivor loses a Health State, for 30 seconds any Survivor succeeding a Good Skill Check while repairing reveals their Aura to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Gearhead

description: Whenever a Survivor loses a Health State, they suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Genetic Limits

description: Each time a Survivor is hooked for the first time, Grim Embrace gains +1 Token and activates once you are at least 16 metres from the Hook. 1–3 Tokens: blocks all Generators for {duration} seconds. 4 Tokens: blocks all Generators for 40 seconds and reveals the Obsession's Aura to you for 6 seconds.
name: Grim Embrace

description: Whenever a Survivor stops opening an Exit Gate after accumulating at least 80 % Progression, it regresses at {percentage}% of the normal Gate-Opening speed. Survivors see the lights atop the switch flickering randomly while it regresses.
name: Haywire

description: After damaging a Generator, it becomes a Compromised Generator. Once the Compromised Generator is completed, for {duration} seconds the Recovery speed of successful Basic Attacks is increased by +25 %.
name: Help Wanted

description: Lights a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial. Whenever a Survivor loses a Health State, all upright Pallets within {range} metres of that Survivor are blocked for 15 seconds and cannot be dropped by any Survivor. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Blood Favour

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Rushed Vault action at a Window, it is blocked for all Survivors. Basic-vault speed of blocked Windows is increased by 15 %, and their Auras are revealed within 24 metres. Can affect up to {value} Windows at a time. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Crowd Control

description: Lights a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial. Whenever a Survivor is unhooked at least 24 metres from your location, Hex: Devour Hope gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. 2 Tokens: 10 seconds after hooking a Survivor, you gain a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds. 3 Tokens: all Survivors suffer from the Exposed Status Effect. 5 Tokens: unlocks the Kill ability, allowing you to kill dying Survivors by your own hands. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Devour Hope

description: If a Dull Totem remains in the environment, lights a Hex Totem after injuring a Survivor, cursing them. While cursed, once every {duration} seconds all other Survivors outside the Terror Radius scream and their Auras are revealed to you for 2 seconds. Deactivates once the cursed Survivor returns to Healthy or enters the Dying State, extinguishing the Hex Totem. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Face the Darkness

description: If a Dull Totem remains in the environment, lights a Hex Totem whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, cursing them with the Oblivious Status Effect. The Hex Totem is blocked for all other Survivors for 90 seconds and cannot be cleansed or blessed (the cursed Survivor is unaffected). The Aura of the Hex Totem is revealed to the cursed Survivor within {range} metres. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Fortune's Fool

description: Lights 2 Hex Totems at the start of the Trial. Blessing or cleansing either Hex Totem causes all Survivors to suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds, and extinguishes the second Hex Totem. Disabled for the remainder of the Trial after triggering its effect.
name: Hex: Haunted Ground

description: The first time you hook any Survivor, a random Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem (if one remains). Generators are highlighted, with Aura intensity reflecting repair progress. Once 4 Generators have been completed, all remaining Generators explode, lose {percentage}% progress, and start regressing; the Hex Totem becomes dull and the perk is disabled for the remainder of the Trial. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Hive Mind

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions suffer a {percentage}% increased Progression penalty for Failed Skill Checks. Each time a Survivor is hooked, Hex: Huntress Lullaby gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens, which reduces the time between the audio cue announcing an imminent Skill Check and it appearing: 1 Token: -14 %, 2 Tokens: -28 %, 3 Tokens: -42 %, 4 Tokens: -56 %, 5 Tokens: suppresses the audio cue altogether. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Huntress Lullaby

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, if a Dull Totem remains it is lit as a Hex Totem: you gain a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect and all Survivors suffer from the Exposed Status Effect. Once the Status Effect is revealed to Survivors, the Aura of the Hex Totem is revealed to Survivors within 4 metres, expanding to 24 metres over 30 seconds. Inactive if no Dull Totems are available. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: No One Escapes Death

description: After damaging Survivors 8 times with Basic Attacks, a random Dull Totem becomes a Hex Totem. Survivors damaged by a Basic Attack suffer from a -5 % Hindered Status Effect for {duration} seconds. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Nothing but Misery

description: Creates a Hex Totem that curses the farthest Generator from its location, highlighting its Aura in yellow. When a Survivor repairs the cursed Generator for at least 5 seconds, for {duration} seconds your Terror Radius transfers to that Generator (set to 32 metres) and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect. Once the cursed Generator is repaired, the next farthest Generator becomes cursed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Overture of Doom

description: The Auras of cleansed Totems are revealed to you in white. Press the Interaction button over the remains of a cleansed Totem to resurrect it as a Rekindled Totem. For each Rekindled Totem, Hex: Pentimento gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. 1 Token: reduces the Action speeds for Healing and Repairing by -20 %. 2–5 Tokens: increases the penalty by a stackable {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Cursed Survivors see the Auras of Rekindled Totems within 16 metres. At 5 Tokens, all Rekindled Totems are blocked for the remainder of the Trial. Totems may only be rekindled once per Trial; the remains are consumed once cleansed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Pentimento

description: Whenever a Survivor blesses or cleanses a Totem, they suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Whenever a Hex Totem is removed by any means, including its own, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for 20 seconds. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Retribution

description: All Generators not currently being repaired automatically regress at {percentage}% of the default Regression rate. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Ruin

description: The last {value} Survivors you hit with a Basic or Special Attack suffer permanently from the Blindness Status Effect. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: The Third Seal

description: Start the Trial with 5 Tokens, one for each Totem. The Action speeds for Blessing and Cleansing are reduced by a stack-able {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Loses -1 Token whenever a Totem is cleansed. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Thrill of the Hunt

description: After being stunned or blinded by Survivors a total of {value} times, if no Hex Totem is yet associated with this perk and at least one Dull Totem remains, activates on a random Totem: blinds all Survivors who stun or blind you for 1.5 seconds (does not affect carried Survivors). The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Two Can Play

description: Whenever a Survivor is within {range} metres of a Dull Totem, their Aura is revealed to you for as long as they remain in range. Whenever a Hex Totem is cleansed, the cleansed Hex transfers to the Hex Totem associated with Hex: Undying instead, replacing it. The Hex Effects persist until the Hex Totem is blessed or cleansed, disabling it for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hex: Undying

description: After a Generator is completed, lights a random Dull Totem, cursing the Obsession: reduces their Repair speed by {percentage}%. The Aura of the Hex Totem is revealed to them within 12 metres.
name: Hex: Wretched Fate

description: Triggers a Loud Noise Notification for 4 seconds whenever a Survivor unlocks a Chest or picks up any Item within {range} metres of your location. Spawns 2 additional Chests in the Trial.
name: Hoarder

description: Whenever a Survivor stuns you, they suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 20 seconds.
name: Hubris

description: Grants the ability to kick opened Chests, closing them. The Auras of unopened Chests are revealed to you at all times. The Auras of Survivors coming within 8 metres of unopened or closed Chests are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. The kick-Chest ability has a cool-down of 10 seconds.
name: Human Greed

description: Whenever you injure a healthy Survivor, all currently injured Survivors (including the Survivor triggering it) suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 20 seconds.
name: Hysteria

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Rushed Vault action within 48 metres of your location, their Aura is revealed to you for 8 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: I'm All Ears

description: Whenever a Survivor is put into the Dying State, all other Survivors within your Terror Radius scream and reveal their current location to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Infectious Fright

description: After standing still for {duration} second(s), you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for as long as you remain stationary. Deactivates once you start moving again.
name: Insidious

description: While carrying a Survivor, the strength of their Involuntary Strafing is reduced by -75 % and the time required to break free from your grasp is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Iron Grasp

description: While interacting with an empty Locker, your Search speed is increased by {percentage}%. Whenever a Survivor exits a Locker, they scream and trigger a Loud Noise Notification at their current location (lingers for 4 seconds), and suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for 30 seconds.
name: Iron Maiden

description: Damaging any Survivor other than the Obsession with a Basic Attack grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. Damaging the Obsession with a Basic or Special Attack consumes -2 Tokens. Successful Basic Attack Cool-down is reduced by a stack-able -4 % per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage}%. The current Token count freezes once the Obsession is sacrificed or killed. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Keep Them Waiting

description: Whenever a Survivor moves farther than 6 metres from a Pallet within 6 seconds of dropping it, they suffer from a -5 % Hindered Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Knock Out

description: When a Survivor scares off a Crow within 36 metres of your location, they suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 5 seconds.
name: Languid Touch

description: At the start of the Trial, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Extends the duration of every Survivor Aura reveal to you by +2 seconds. Benefits from its own effect.
name: Lethal Pursuer

description: Whenever a Survivor performs an Unhook action, their Healing speeds are reduced by {percentage}% for 60 seconds.
name: Leverage

description: The Auras of Survivors attempting to blind you are revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Grants immunity to blinding from Flashlights, Firecrackers, Flash Grenades, and Blast Mine.
name: Lightborn

description: After damaging a Generator, it becomes a Compromised Generator. Damaging another Generator transfers the state to it instead. The Aura of the Compromised Generator is highlighted to you in yellow until completed. Once completed, for {duration} seconds you gain the Undetectable Status Effect and a +8 % Haste Status Effect. Deactivates after use.
name: Machine Learning

description: While carrying a Survivor, the Cool-down of missed Basic Attacks is removed. Each time you successfully hit another Survivor, the Wiggle Progression of the carried Survivor is paused for {duration} seconds.
name: Mad Grit

description: Whenever a Survivor is rescued from a Hook while you are farther than 32 metres away, the unhooking Survivor screams and reveals their location to you, and suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration2} seconds.
name: Make Your Choice

description: Whenever a Generator reaches 90 % Repair progression, all Survivors repairing it face a continuous stream of Skill Checks until it is completed. If any contributing Survivor fails a Skill Check or interrupts the action, the Generator is blocked for {duration} seconds. Can only trigger once per Generator per Trial.
name: Merciless Storm

description: While repairing a Generator, Survivors suffer from the Blindness and Exhausted Status Effects. Both linger for {duration} seconds after ending the interaction. Cannot override an existing Exhausted Status Effect, but pauses its timer instead.
name: Mindbreaker

description: While actively chasing a Survivor, your Terror Radius is increased by {percentage}%. Otherwise, your Terror Radius is reduced by {percentage2}%.
name: Monitor & Abuse

description: Whenever a Survivor other than the Obsession blinds you or stuns you with a Pallet or a Locker, they become the Obsession. The new Obsession suffers from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds and has their Aura revealed to you for 8 seconds. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Nemesis

description: Each time a Generator is completed, the Generator with the most Progression is blocked for {duration} seconds. Its Aura is highlighted to you in white.
name: No Holds Barred

description: Whenever a Survivor healing themselves reaches 75 % Healing Progress, they face a continuous stream of Skill Checks until the Self-Heal is completed. If they fail a Skill Check or interrupt the action, they suffer from the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: No Quarter

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, No Way Out gains +1 Token. Once the Exit Gates are powered, the first Survivor to interact with either Exit Gate Switch triggers a Loud Noise Notification at their location, and both Exit Gate Switches are blocked for 12 seconds, extended by an additional {duration} seconds per Token, up to a combined maximum of {duration2} seconds.
name: No Way Out

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, None Are Free gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 4 Tokens. Once all Generators are completed, all Windows and upright Pallets are blocked for a stack-able {duration} seconds per Token, up to a maximum of {duration2} seconds.
name: None Are Free

description: After damaging a Generator, the Auras of all Survivors within 24 metres of your location are revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Nowhere to Hide

description: Whenever a Survivor starts using an Item within 32 metres of your location, they suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect for 15 seconds. Whenever a Survivor within 32 metres becomes Exhausted, the Aura of the closest Exhausted Survivor is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 25 seconds.
name: Oppression

description: Whenever you perform the Damage Generator action, up to 4 other Generators are randomly selected and start regressing, and all Survivors currently repairing those Generators must succeed a difficult Skill Check or the Generator explodes and regresses. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Oppression

description: After damaging a Generator, the next Survivor interacting with it faces a difficult Skill Check. The Generator is instantly regressed by {percentage}% of its maximum Progression in addition to the default Progression penalty. For the next 30 seconds, its Regression speed increases from 85 % to 130 % of its default value.
name: Overcharge

description: Whenever a Survivor within your Terror Radius looks at you, they scream and their Aura is revealed to you for 2 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Phantom Fear

description: After hooking a Survivor, for {duration} seconds the next manual damage to a Generator is increased by +15 % for a total of 20 % regression. Deactivates after use or once the timer elapses.
name: Pop Goes the Weasel

description: Whenever you lose a Survivor in a Chase, their Aura is revealed to you for 4 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Predator

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, all Survivors scream and trigger a Loud Noise Notification at their current location (lingers for 3 seconds), and your Aura is revealed to the Obsession for {duration} seconds. Once the Exit Gates are powered, the Obsession suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial, and you can kill them when in close proximity. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Rancor

description: You can no longer gain the Bloodlust Status Effect. Successfully hitting a Survivor with a Basic Attack grants a +5 % Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Rapid Brutality

description: Whenever you hook a Survivor for the first time, Ravenous gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 4 Tokens. At 4 Tokens, all Survivors scream and suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Ravenous

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Whenever the Obsession loses a Health State, Remember Me gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. The Opening time of both Exit Gates is increased by a stack-able 6 seconds per Token, up to a maximum additional {duration} seconds (a total of {duration2} seconds). Does not apply to the Obsession, who opens both Exit Gates in the default 20 seconds. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Remember Me

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted in white. Each time a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Floods of Rage

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted in white. Each time a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, they suffer from the Haemorrhage Status Effect for 90 seconds. After the first time they are healed back to full health, their Healing and Repairing Action speeds are reduced by {percentage}% until they are injured again.
name: Scourge Hook: Gift of Pain

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted in white. While carrying a Survivor, the Auras of all Survivors within {range} metres of a Scourge Hook are revealed to you. Whenever a Survivor starts the Sabotage action on any Hook, a Loud Noise Notification triggers at its location.
name: Scourge Hook: Hangman's Trick

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted in white. Whenever a Survivor is unhooked from a normal Hook, that Hook is converted into a Scourge Hook. Whenever you hook a Survivor onto a Scourge Hook, the Aura of the Generator with the most progression is highlighted in yellow for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Jagged Compass

description: At the start of the Trial, the 4 Basement Hooks and 4 additional Hooks throughout the Trial Grounds become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted to you in white. Whenever you are farther than 24 metres from a Survivor hooked onto a Scourge Hook, their Sacrifice Process is accelerated by {percentage}%.
name: Scourge Hook: Monstrous Shrine

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted in white, and Pain Resonance starts with 4 Tokens. Whenever a Survivor is hooked onto a Scourge Hook for the first time, Pain Resonance consumes -1 Token: the Generator with the most progression explodes, is instantly regressed by {percentage}% of its total Progression, and starts regressing afterwards. All Survivors repairing that Generator scream (this does not trigger a Loud Noise Notification). Disabled for the remainder of the Trial once all Tokens are consumed.
name: Scourge Hook: Pain Resonance

description: At the start of the Trial, 4 Hooks become Scourge Hooks with Auras highlighted in white. Each time a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, they suffer from the Haemorrhage Status Effect for 90 seconds. After the first time they are healed back to full health, their Healing and Repairing Action speeds are reduced by {percentage}% until they are injured again.
name: Scourge Hook: Weeping Wounds

description: Whenever a Totem is blessed or cleansed, a random unblocked Generator is blocked for {duration} seconds. Whenever any number of Generators become blocked, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for 30 seconds.
name: Secret Project

description: Losing your Obsession in a chase grants +1 Token (max 3 Tokens); performing a Basic or Special Attack with the potential to damage a Survivor consumes -1 Token. While having at least 1 Token, you gain a stack-able {percentage}% Haste Status Effect per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Has a cool-down of 10 seconds between gaining additional Tokens. You can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: See How They Run

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Healing action while inside your Terror Radius, they suffer from the Blindness and Exhausted Status Effects. These linger for {duration} seconds after the Healing action is interrupted.
name: Septic Touch

description: Whenever you are blinded by any means, you gain a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds.
name: Shadowborn

description: Instead of snuffing Boon Totems, you destroy them. Destroying a Boon Totem reveals the Auras of all Survivors that were within its range at that moment for {duration} seconds.
name: Shattered Hope

description: Survivors hit with your Basic Attack suffer from the Haemorrhage and Mangled Status Effects for {duration} seconds. The potency of Haemorrhage is modified: the Spawn frequency of Pools of Blood is increased by {percentage}% and the Regression rate of partial Healing progression is increased by +25 %.
name: Sloppy Butcher

description: Whenever a Survivor startles a Crow within {range} metres of your location, you are alerted with a unique Loud Noise Notification in the shape of a Crow. Has a cool-down of 5 seconds between alerts.
name: Spies from the Shadows

description: After manually breaking {value} dropped Pallets, the next Pallet used by a Survivor to stun you is instantly broken. Deactivates after use and does not affect the duration of the Pallet Stun.
name: Spirit Fury

description: While carrying a Survivor, all other Survivors in your Terror Radius suffer from the Exposed Status Effect. The effect lingers for {duration} seconds after affected Survivors leave the Terror Radius or Starstruck deactivates. Deactivates after hooking or dropping the carried Survivor and has a cool-down of 60 seconds.
name: Starstruck

description: The volume of Grunts of Pain of injured Survivors is increased by {percentage}% and the volume of regular breathing of Survivors is increased by {percentage2}%.
name: Stridor

description: Whenever a Survivor performs a Rush Vault action within 12 metres of your location, your Vaulting speed is increased by {percentage}%. Deactivates after vaulting. Has a cool-down of 25 seconds.
name: Superior Anatomy

description: Whenever you put a Survivor into the Dying State with your Basic Attack, all Generators within 32 metres instantly explode and start regressing, and are instantly regressed by {percentage}%.
name: Surge

description: The Auras of damaged Generators are highlighted based on their state: white if currently regressing, yellow if regression stopped due to Survivor intervention. The highlight lasts for {duration} seconds before returning to its default colour. While Survivors are repairing Generators, the audible range of all noises related to the Repair interaction is increased by +8 metres.
name: Surveillance

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, all injured, dying, or hooked Survivors suffer from the Broken Status Effect. Lasts until an Exit Gate is opened, then lingers for another {duration} seconds.
name: Terminus

description: Whenever a Survivor enters the Basement while you are farther than 24 metres from its entrance, their Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Has a cool-down of 45 seconds.
name: Territorial Imperative

description: Whenever at least one Survivor is injured, dying, or hooked, all Survivors suffer a stack-able {percentage}% Action-Speed penalty per injured, dying, or hooked Survivor for Cleansing, Repairing, and Sabotaging, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. If all four Survivors are injured, dying, or hooked, the penalty increases by an additional +12 % to a total of {percentage3}%.
name: Thanatophobia

description: After picking up a Survivor, all Generators not currently being repaired are blocked for 16 seconds. The Auras of blocked Generators are highlighted to you in white. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Thrilling Tremors

description: Start the Trial with 3 Tokens. Whenever you break a Breakable Wall or a dropped Pallet, THWACK! consumes -1 Token: all Survivors within 36 metres of your location scream and their Auras are revealed for {duration} seconds. Whenever you hook a Survivor, THWACK! gains +1 Token.
name: THWACK!

description: Whenever a Generator reaches 70 % repair, a Loud Noise Notification triggers at that Generator revealing its location, and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for the next {duration} seconds. Can only trigger once per Generator per Trial.
name: Tinkerer

description: After damaging a Generator, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect. The Aura of the damaged Generator is revealed to all Survivors and highlighted in yellow. Deactivates after the Generator stops regressing, and has a cool-down of {duration} seconds between activations.
name: Trail of Torment

description: After hooking a Survivor, for {duration} seconds press the Active Ability button to make a target Generator within 20 metres explode, lose -10 % progress, and start regressing.
name: Turn Back the Clock

description: Whenever you search a Locker, all Survivors within 40 metres scream, reveal their location to you, and suffer from the Blindness Status Effect for 30 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Ultimate Weapon

description: When a Survivor becomes injured, for {duration} seconds vaulting a Window grants a +7 % Haste Status Effect for 10 seconds. Cannot stack with itself.
name: Unbound

description: For every Repair or Healing Skill Check failed by a Survivor, Undone gains +3 Tokens, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. Damaging a Generator consumes all accumulated Tokens: it is instantly regressed by a stack-able -1 % per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage}%, and blocked for 1 second per Token, up to a maximum of {duration} seconds. The Generator starts regressing once it becomes unblocked. Has a cool-down of 60 seconds.
name: Undone

description: After damaging a Generator, for {duration} seconds your Terror Radius transfers to that Generator (set to 32 metres) and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect. Has a cool-down of 30 seconds.
name: Unforeseen

description: While inside your Terror Radius, Survivors performing Repairing or Healing actions have a +10 % increased chance of triggering a Skill Check, and the Success zone of those Skill Checks is reduced by {percentage}%.
name: Unnerving Presence

description: The Cool-down time of missed Basic Attacks is reduced by {percentage}%.
name: Unrelenting

description: Whenever you start chasing a Survivor, the Auras of all other injured Survivors within 20 metres of your location are revealed to you for 5 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Wandering Eye

description: Whenever an Item is depleted for the first time, it is automatically dropped. The Auras of dropped Survivor Items are revealed to you, along with the Auras of any Survivors within 12 metres of them. Affected Survivors also see the Aura of that Item. Survivors picking up a Survivor Item suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Weave Attunement

description: Whenever any Survivor is within {range} metres of your location, you hear sporadic whispers of The Entity, indicating a Survivor's presence.
name: Whispers

description: The Auras of Pallets and Windows are revealed to you within 32 metres. Whenever a Survivor drops a Pallet, their Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Zanshin Tactics
